title: Fill the CRM from a Form — IDAP Field Types + crm_target
summary: Make a Form populate the tenant CRM on submit. Wire each form field to a typed norm_cli_<tenant>.<resource_type>.<column> via crm_target, and use the 8 IDAP-anchored field types (url / country / region / postal_code / address / datetime / currency / place) so the value is structurally compatible with the column. Includes the field-type ↔ column compatibility matrix and the server-proxy behaviour of the place field (graceful fallback to free text when GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY is not provisioned). Use whenever the user asks for 'forms that fill the CRM', 'lead form with structured CRM fields', 'address picker on a form', 'Google Places form field', 'country picker', 'currency form field'.
